name: Slayer Of Terramorphous
description: Bandit class mod for Zer0 the Assassin. Drops from Terramorphous the Invincible. Built around Headsh0t, 0ptics, Fast Hands, C0unter Strike, Ir0n Hand, Sentry, Ready, Impact, Expertise, Healthy.
notes: Part of a set of Terramorphous-only items. Collecting all of them combines their red text into a short poem.

special.description: At max level, Zer0s Slayer Of Terramorphous grants: +37% burn damage, +37% ignite chance, and +1,101,229 health.
